name: Heimstaden AB (publ)
summary: Heimstaden AB (publ), through its subsidiaries, owns, develops, and manages residential properties in Sweden, Denmark, Norway, the Czech Republic, the Netherlands, and Germany. The company was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Malm√É¬∂, Sweden. Heimstaden AB (publ) is a subsidiary of Fredensborg AS.
